## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet csharpier check .` passes
- [ ] Build and unit suites pass (`Protocol.Tests`, `EntityFrameworkCore.Tests`, `Analyzers.Tests`, `PackageTests`)
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] Public-API baselines updated if the public surface changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.gitignore` committed as part of a feature
